OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jak S. Marquez, Esq. for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation with property manager, Abdolloh Dos present.
Andrea K. Anapolsky, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Ann Thompson, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. The parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and Settlement Agreement, which is not filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 44 McAllister Street, #604, San Francisco, CA 94102. Trial date vacated.

JPT Andrew Westley, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
